standard.title: Chooty Member
standard.description: Have design ready to build? Or small budget?
features: Special loyalty badges next to your name in comments
Access to unique Kota-themed emojis for live chats.
Memes posted by Standard members on r/TKASYLUM get reviewed first

premium.title: Asylum Boss
premium.description: Full design and development from scratch.
features: Access to uncut, raw reaction footage or exclusive
A private, VIP role and chat room inside official Discord server.
Your name listed in the credits or read out loud at the end of his reaction videos.
Monthly, members-only live streams to chat directly with him.
